cases.label: overlimp_vs_1_limper
notes: Current frame-level classifier uses iso_vs_1_limper; action may be call/fold/iso_raise by range.

cases.label: overlimp_vs_2plus_limpers
notes: Current frame-level classifier uses iso_vs_2plus_limpers; action may be call/fold/iso_raise by range.

cases.label: facing_open_callers
notes: Frame-level commitments do not encode caller order; node may remain blind_vs_open/facing_open.

cases.label: squeeze
notes: Frame-level classifier may not name squeeze separately; range action should still map to runtime.

cases.label: caller_vs_3bet_or_higher
notes: Frame-only classifier may not distinguish caller-vs-squeeze precisely.

cases.label: dirty_allin_unknown_amount
notes: Live-like dirty all-in flag with invalid amount must not error; V2.41 maps fallback to FOLD.

cases.label: safe_fold_spot
notes: Bad input must fall back to runtime fold after V2.41.
